summary: Verified portal-context-aware subscription paywall fix. Backend tests pass (8/8). Frontend shows correct benefactor plans on /subscription route. The fix correctly uses window.location.pathname.startsWith('/beneficiary') instead of user.role to determine which plans to display.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js (Lines 148-158): ProtectedRoute paywall gating now uses isOnBeneficiaryRoute = window.location.pathname.startsWith('/beneficiary') instead of checking user.role - FIX VERIFIED

SubscriptionManagement.js (Lines 132-142): isInBeneficiaryPortal = window.location.pathname.startsWith('/beneficiary') determines which plans to show, currentPlanId is filtered by portal context - FIX VERIFIED
SubscriptionPaywall.js: Shows benefactor plans always - correct since it's only rendered on benefactor routes via ProtectedRoute gating
Backend /api/subscriptions/plans returns both 'plans' (8 benefactor) and 'beneficiary_plans' (8 beneficiary) arrays correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Benefactor portal correctly shows benefactor plans

context_for_next_testing_agent: Portal-context-aware subscription fix verified. SubscriptionManagement uses window.location.pathname.startsWith('/beneficiary') to determine plan display. On benefactor portal (/subscription, /settings), benefactor plans (premium, standard, base, etc.) are shown. On beneficiary portal (/beneficiary/settings), beneficiary plans (ben_premium, ben_standard, ben_base) should be shown. ProtectedRoute paywall gating also uses route context, not user.role.

verified_features.backend_checkout_beta: PASS - Checkout saves plan preference in beta mode for multi-role users
verified_features.frontend_benefactor_subscription_page: PASS - Shows Premium, Standard, Base, New Adult, Military, Hospice plans (benefactor plans)
verified_features.frontend_no_ben_plans_on_benefactor_port: PASS - Beneficiary plans (ben_*) NOT displayed on /subscription route
verified_features.portal_context_detection: PASS - isInBeneficiaryPortal correctly detects route context

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS OTP: MOCKED - OTP globally disabled via platform_settings.otp_disabled=true

screenshots: .screenshots/02_subscription_page.png - Subscription page showing benefactor plans (Premium, Standard, Base, etc.)
